scripts.test:parallel: BUILD_ID=$(node -p "crypto.randomUUID()") sh -c 'mocha --require ts-node/register --timeout 300s tests/home-page.test.ts & mocha --require ts-node/register --timeout 300s tests/shop-page.test.ts & mocha --require ts-node/register --timeout 300s tests/product-page.test.ts & mocha --require ts-node/register --timeout 300s tests/misc-pages.test.ts & wait'
